message:
fix: Watch all repos in workspace mode (closes #79)

Problem: watch-export only monitored first repo's issues.jsonl

Solution:
- Detect workspace mode and load all enabled repos
- Create watcher for each repo's issues.jsonl
- Merge change events from all watchers
- Reload using appropriate method (workspace vs single-repo)
- Proper cleanup of all watchers on exit

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
